'''鈭歨-f-s''' ('''hafasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machinify|machinify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machinify|machinify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-f-s
|-
! Lemma
| hafasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hafasithi|hafasithi]] || [[word:hafasiji|hafasiji]] || [[word:hafasishi|hafasishi]] || [[word:hafasi|hafasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hafasuthuth|hafasuthuth]] || [[word:hafasujuj|hafasujuj]] || [[word:hafasushush|hafasushush]] || [[word:hafas|hafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hafasuthu|hafasuthu]] || [[word:hafasuju|hafasuju]] || [[word:hafasushu|hafasushu]] || [[word:hafasu|hafasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hafasufuth|hafasufuth]] || [[word:hafasufuj|hafasufuj]] || [[word:hafasufush|hafasufush]] || [[word:hafasuf|hafasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hafasethe|hafasethe]] || [[word:hafaseje|hafaseje]] || [[word:hafaseshe|hafaseshe]] || [[word:hafase|hafase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hafasothoth|hafasothoth]] || [[word:hafasojoj|hafasojoj]] || [[word:hafasoshosh|hafasoshosh]] || [[word:hafas|hafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hafasotho|hafasotho]] || [[word:hafasojo|hafasojo]] || [[word:hafasosho|hafasosho]] || [[word:hafaso|hafaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hafasofoth|hafasofoth]] || [[word:hafasofoj|hafasofoj]] || [[word:hafasofosh|hafasofosh]] || [[word:hafasof|hafasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hafas忙th忙|hafas忙th忙]] || [[word:hafas忙j忙|hafas忙j忙]] || [[word:hafas忙sh忙|hafas忙sh忙]] || [[word:hafas忙|hafas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hafasathath|hafasathath]] || [[word:hafasajaj|hafasajaj]] || [[word:hafasashash|hafasashash]] || [[word:hafas|hafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hafasatha|hafasatha]] || [[word:hafasaja|hafasaja]] || [[word:hafasasha|hafasasha]] || [[word:hafasa|hafasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hafasafath|hafasafath]] || [[word:hafasafaj|hafasafaj]] || [[word:hafasafash|hafasafash]] || [[word:hafasaf|hafasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hafasasha|hafasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohafasasha|gohafasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihafasasha|gokihafasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafasn眉sha|hafasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohafasnkn眉sha|gohafasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihafasn眉sha|gokihafasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafash毛sha|hafash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafasnksh毛sha|gohafasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafash毛sha|gokihafash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hafasrosha|hafasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohafasnkrosha|gohafasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihafasrosha|gokihafasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hafasmusha|hafasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafasnkmusha|gohafasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafasmusha|gokihafasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hafasherasha|hafasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohafasnksherasha|gohafasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihafasherasha|gokihafasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hafasngasha|hafasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohafasnkngasha|gohafasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihafasngasha|gokihafasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hafasyasha|hafasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohafasnkyasha|gohafasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihafasyasha|gokihafasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hafasyamasha|hafasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohafasnkyamasha|gohafasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihafasyamasha|gokihafasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hafasn眉sh毛sha|hafasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohafasnkn眉sh毛sha|gohafasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihafasn眉sh毛sha|gokihafasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hafasn眉rosha|hafasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohafasnkn眉rosha|gohafasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihafasn眉rosha|gokihafasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafasn眉musha|hafasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafasnkn眉musha|gohafasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafasn眉musha|gokihafasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hafash毛n眉sha|hafash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohafasnksh毛n眉sha|gohafasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihafash毛n眉sha|gokihafash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hafash毛rosha|hafash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohafasnksh毛rosha|gohafasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihafash毛rosha|gokihafash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafash毛musha|hafash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafasnksh毛musha|gohafasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafash毛musha|gokihafash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hafasron眉sha|hafasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohafasnkron眉sha|gohafasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihafasron眉sha|gokihafasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hafasrosh毛sha|hafasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohafasnkrosh毛sha|gohafasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihafasrosh毛sha|gokihafasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafasromusha|hafasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafasnkromusha|gohafasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafasromusha|gokihafasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hafasmun眉sha|hafasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohafasnkmun眉sha|gohafasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihafasmun眉sha|gokihafasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hafasmush毛sha|hafasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohafasnkmush毛sha|gohafasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihafasmush毛sha|gokihafasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hafasmurosha|hafasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohafasnkmurosha|gohafasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihafasmurosha|gokihafasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hafas|hafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:h忙f忙s|h忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohafas|hohafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoh忙f忙s|hoh忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohafas|hohohafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoh忙f忙s|hohoh忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉hafas|n眉hafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉h忙f忙s|n眉h忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉hafas|n眉n眉hafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉h忙f忙s|n眉n眉h忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂hafas|n茂hafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂h忙f忙s|n茂h忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂hafas|n茂n茂hafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂h忙f忙s|n茂n茂h忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhafas|luhafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luh忙f忙s|luh忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhafas|luluhafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluh忙f忙s|luluh忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihafas|lihafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lih忙f忙s|lih忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihafas|lilihafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilih忙f忙s|lilih忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohafas|kohafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koh忙f忙s|koh忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohafas|kokohafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoh忙f忙s|kokoh忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehafas|kehafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keh忙f忙s|keh忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehafas|kekehafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeh忙f忙s|kekeh忙f忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
